statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

statistics.name: turnovers
statistics.description: The number of times a player loses possession to the other team.

statistics.description: The total number of minutes played.

statistics.name: assistTurnoverRatio
statistics.description: The average number of assists a player or team records per turnover

statistics.description: The total number of rebounds (offensive and defensive).

statistics.description: The number of times when the defense obtains the possession of the ball after a missed shot by the offense.

article.description: Gabriel McCray had 23 points on 9-of-13 shooting, and South Carolina State beat Longwood 83-77 in the Eastern Kentucky Hoops Classic on Friday night.
article.headline: McCray scores 23, SC State beats Longwood 83-77
article.linkText: McCray scores 23, SC State beats Longwood 83-77
article.story: RICHMOND, Ky. -- Gabriel McCray had 23 points on 9-of-13 shooting, and South Carolina State beat Longwood 83-77 in the Eastern Kentucky Hoops Classic on Friday night. Greg Mortimer's 3-pointer gave the Bulldogs (2-1) an 8-point lead with 2:21 left and McCray's jumper at the 53-second mark made it 77-68. Lotanna Nwogbo had career highs with 27 points and 15 rebounds for Longwood (2-1). The Lancers twice narrowed a 9-point halftime deficit to 2 but never took the lead in the second half. Ed Stephens had 12 points with 3-of-6 3-point shooting and Mortimer added 10 points for South Carolina State. Khris Lane was 6 of 8 for 12 points and Kanayo Obi-Rapu scored 11 for Longwood. McCray scored 14 of his points in the first half to help the Bulldogs build a 39-30 lead at intermission.
